description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard box, commonly used for shipping or storing goods in urban environments. The box is sealed with a single strip of wide, light gray packing tape running along the top seam and extending partially down the shorter vertical faces. The cardboard surface is a uniform light brown color, typical of corrugated packaging material, and appears unmarked with no visible labels, logos, or writing. The box has crisp, straight edges and flat surfaces, indicating it is new or only lightly handled. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight but sturdy enough to hold a variety of contents. Its simple, utilitarian design makes it suitable for placement on sidewalks, in garages, or near building entrances.
description: A light brown rectangular cardboard box sealed with a strip of gray packing tape, featuring clean edges and a plain, unmarked surface.
description_view_0: The broad side of the box is visible, showing a flat, uninterrupted cardboard surface with the top seam and tape just visible at the upper edge.
description_view_1: The narrow end of the box is shown, with the gray tape running vertically down the center and extending slightly onto the face.
description_view_2: Another broad side is visible, nearly identical to view 0, with the top seam and tape faintly visible at the upper edge.
description_view_3: The opposite narrow end is shown, mirroring view 1, with the tape running vertically down the center.
